On April 11th, six city blocks of Roosevelt Row will come alive with live music, art, food, and good vibes as Phoenix’s favorite counter culture festival takes over the streets. We’re talking two stages of nonstop music, live glass blowing demos, massive murals being painted in real time, and 20+ food and dessert vendors bringing every kind of munchie imaginable. Add in four bars, local artisans, and plenty of surprises, and you’ve got one unforgettable night in the heart of downtown. rows.Event Name: Lihn Law Group 2026 Elder Care and Legal Symposium
rows.Event Description: Join us at the Lihn Law Group 2026 Elder Care and Legal Symposium for a day of learning innovative solutions on critical elder care issues. Professionals who serve older adults are often the first to recognize when something has begun to change. A client who once managed everything independently begins to struggle with decisions. A family senses vulnerability but isn’t sure what steps to take. Financial behavior shifts unexpectedly. Situations emerge gradually, without clear answers, and professionals are asked to help navigate what comes next. These moments carry real consequences — for safety, autonomy, and quality of life. The Lihn Law Group Elder Care & Legal Symposium was created to support professionals in exactly these moments. This interdisciplinary symposium brings together clinical, legal, advocacy, and investigative perspectives to help professionals strengthen awareness, deepen judgment, and respond thoughtfully when supporting older adults and vulnerable individuals. This year’s program will address critical issues professionals increasingly encounter in practice, including: • Recognizing and assessing diminished decision-making capacity Attendance is limited to preserve a meaningful and interactive professional environment. Early registration is encouraged. This symposium is designed for professionals who work with or support older adults, including: • Social workers If your work involves supporting older adults or vulnerable individuals, this symposium will provide practical insight and interdisciplinary perspective relevant to your role. • Eight (8) credits were approved, by NASW, for Licensed Social Workers. *Continuing education credits are currently pending approval for Case Managers. Professionals supporting older adults are often called upon to help navigate situations where there is uncertainty, vulnerability, and no clear roadmap. This symposium provides an opportunity to learn from interdisciplinary experts, strengthen professional judgment, and connect with others who share a commitment to protecting and supporting vulnerable individuals. This annual gathering reflects a shared responsibility among professionals to serve older adults with clarity, skill, and compassion.

rows.Event Name: Lunchtime Theater: Hometown Heroes Barbershop Quartet
rows.Event Description: Hometown Heroes Barbershop Quartet blends their unique harmony of voices to a fun medley of Americana favorite. Hometown Heroes Barbershop Quartet adds the unique harmony of their voices to a fun lineup of American favorites in a popular Lunchtime Theater series at the Arts HQ Gallery in Surprise, AZ. Surrounded by the gallery artwork, enjoy camraderie as the melodic quartet inspires, entertains, and brings people today, celebrating the nostalgic tradition of barbershop music. Lunchtime Theater is a seasonal musical and theater performance program offered to enrich the community of the West Valley in Arizona. Presented in partnership with the West Valley Arts Council and the City of Surprise, and hosted at the Arts HQ Gallery, it is a unique, diverse, and intimate experience among the visual and performing arts. Surrounded by gallery artwork, Arizona talent from the Phoenix Opera to local jazz trios and theater groups perform in an afternoon 1-hour show once a month from October-April. Ticket reservations are required in advance, and attendees are welcome to bring their own lunch or go out and support one of the many local restaurants in Surprise. Open seating begins at 11:30am, and each performance runs 12noon-1pm. (623) 584-2626. The Arts HQ Gallery is located at 16126 N. Civic Center Plaza, Ste 102, in Surprise, AZ just north of the Surprise City Hall. Free parking on either side of the one-story building. The entrance is on the west side. Additional parking in the adjacent City Court parking lot.

rows.Event Name: The Jive Aces with Pat Roberts & The Heymakers @ The Rhythm Room in Phoenix
rows.Event Description: The U.K.'s number one swing and jive band in Phoenix for ONE NIGHT ONLY! As seen on Britain's Got Talent. Together for over three decades, this extremely popular six piece group have performed at thousands of festivals, theatres and events throughout the UK, Europe and USA, as well as Japan, Israel, South Africa, Morrocco and the Caribbean, 30 countries in all. The Jive Aces are renowned for their high energy Jump Jive music (the exciting sound where Swing meets Rock ‘n Roll) and spectacular stage show. They combine a mixture of fresh arrangements of swing - songs made famous by such greats as Louis Prima, Cab Calloway, Bobby Darin, Louis Armstrong, Dean Martin, Big Joe Turner and Sammy Davis Jr. - along with a selection of superb swinging originals taken from their studio albums. The Jive Aces opened the London Olympics, played for the Queen of England at her Diamond Jubilee, were the first band to make it to the finals of Britain's Got Talent, had several viral videos, and have toured around the world three times. Rhythm Room - 1019 E. Indian School Rd., Phoenix Ages 21+ Videos:

rows.Event Name: Tarot Curd: A Cheese & Card Reading
rows.Event Description: An unusual pairing or a divine match? Tarot and cheese have more in common than you think! Ever wonder what your cheese says about you? (Us neither, until now.) Join us for an evening where ancient mysticism meets artisan dairy - because why shouldn't cheese have its fortune told? We're pairing six spectacular American cheeses with Major Arcana tarot cards, exploring the stories, personalities, and straight-up magic in each wheel. Pull a card at the door. Find your cheese on the board. Taste your way through fresh chèvre innocence, cave-aged wisdom, and the beautiful chaos of blue mold breaking through. We'll talk about transformation, partnership, disruption, and joy - all through the lens of really, really good cheese. No tarot experience needed. No cheese expertise required. Just bring your curiosity and maybe a sense of humor about the whole thing. This is mysticism you can eat. Fortune-telling you can taste. The Whey of the Cards. Space is limited to keep things intimate. Grab your spot before they vanish into the ether (or, you know, sell out).

rows.Event Name: 22nd Annual Kappa League Scholarship and Awards Showcase
rows.Event Description: Get ready for the 22nd Annual Kappa League Scholarship and Awards Showcase - a night of celebrating achievements and supporting education! Kappa League is not just an organization; it's a movement dedicated to empowering young men across the valley. Through mentorship, career opportunities, and exposure, Kappa League instills values of leadership, personal growth, and academic excellence in its members. Our program brings together successful men with 6th – 12th grade male students from diverse backgrounds, nurturing their potential and guiding them towards a brighter future. The Annual Kappa League Showcase is the end-of-year celebration highlighting the accomplishments of the Kappa League Scholars. It serves as an opportunity for the Scholars to showcase skills they've learned during the program. It's also an opportunity to raise funds for the Kappa League program to ensure the programs continued success Da’Shaun Holmes, a proud native of St. Petersburg, FL, is a shining example of what focus, drive, and a passion for learning can accomplish. At The Canterbury School of Florida, he distinguished himself early—excelling academically while actively contributing to organizations such as Mu Alpha Theta and the Science National Honor Society. With a clear vision for his future, Da’Shaun pursued Mechanical Engineering at Florida Atlantic University, where his dedication and ingenuity quickly set him apart. In December 2023, he earned his bachelor’s degree and made history at FAU’s Senior Design Showcase, becoming the first student to win both the People’s Choice Award and the Judge’s Choice Award for his innovative senior project. Before crossing the graduation stage, Da’Shaun was selected for a competitive internship with Honeywell Aerospace in Phoenix, AZ, where he trained as an Advanced Manufacturing Engineer. His performance led to a full-time offer in his hometown—but his ambition didn’t stop there. Recognizing where he could make the greatest impact, Da’Shaun returned to Arizona, earning a promotion and continuing to excel in his engineering career. Today, Da’Shaun not only stands as a rising leader in aerospace engineering but also as a proud member of Kappa Alpha Psi Fraternity, Inc., embracing excellence, achievement, and service in everything he pursues

Sorry, no blockbuster movie deals for filming or snapping pics during the show. We know our show is drop-dead amazing, but let's keep it a secret, like Aunt Mildred's recipe for mystery meatloaf. No Audio, No Video, No Photography allowed. Age Before Stage! We love kids, really, but this stage is for the big kids at heart. No children under 17 on stage unless they can levitate on their own (then we'd like to know their secret, please). Prepare your minds, folks! We're about to take you on a rollercoaster of disbelief. Fasten your seatbelts and let the mental mayhem begin! Johnathan Smith The Reality Twister has been fortunate to be able to provide his clients with world-class entertainment for their events that leaves their guests flabbergasted and talking about their experience for YEARS! Power 98.3, 107.7 The Lake, NBC, Today’s Family, Digital Journal, Forbes, NY Review, New York Weekly, News Net Los Angeles, BIZWeekly, Fox 40 — and many more! See you there! 😄🎭.

rows.Event Name: Tantra Speed Date® - Phoenix! (Meet Singles Speed Dating)
rows.Event Description: Join the speed dating revolution with a 94% connection rate! Meet singles and ignite sparks with fun, chemistry games! *More press reviews, success stories and testimonials further down 👇 With our 94.09% connection rate, making a match is almost a sure thing! In fact, we're so confident you'll make at least one connection that 💝 Just read some of the wonderful testimonials below to learn what could happen for you! Contact: Here are some heartwarming stories from people who had their initial doubts but decided to take a chance on Tantra Speed Date®! — Jihan & Joseph At Tantra Speed Date®, our mission goes beyond just helping you find your next match. We're committed to helping you bring more connection into your love life wherever you go! That's why our guided exercises have a "secret" purpose; they So you'll walk away not only with matches but also with a new level of confidence in yourself as both a person and a partner! Plus, you'll learn how to bring more presence into Which will allow you to start engaging with your future dates in a way that's So if you were wondering why singles have dubbed this event as "Yoga for your love life"... Well, now you know! Don't see your question answered below? Check out the Forget those wild myths and blockbuster misunderstandings; Tantra is more about connection, fun, and being present than anything risqué. Imagine it as the art of "relationship yoga," blending age-old practices with a twist of joy and mindfulness. Through exercises like breathing, meditating, and maybe even a little dancing, you'll find yourself more in tune with those around you. It's like a social superpower for making genuine connections, and trust us, it's a blast! After all, we find this level of presence is exactly what's missing from most dating encounters today. Why just talk when you can laugh, connect, and explore together? Picture this: You'll form two fun-filled circles of fellow daters. The men make up the outer ring, and the women form the inner ring; so that you're paired off with a friendly face across from you. Together, you'll dive into engaging and heartfelt mini-dates (we call them 'dating stations') that last just long enough to spark a connection. After each experience, you'll bring your hands into a cheerful 'Namaste', share a quick thank you, and then — whoosh! — off to the next exciting meeting. Keep circling around, and by the end, you'll have met everyone. No clichéd icebreakers here! Our exercises are all about authentic human connection, not cheesy romance. We're talking engaging dialogue, light partner yoga, movement/dance, heartwarming eye-gazing, and even some gentle hand-holding. It's a delightful mix that goes beyond the mundane 'what's your job' chatter. The coolest part? Every exercise is wrapped around a positive relating skill. So, not only will you have a blast, you'll be building real relationship skills too! And remember consent, you're the boss of how you participate. It's all about fun and connection in a way that feels good for you. Thanks for asking! While the exercises are straightforward and fun, you are always 100% at choice for how you wish to participate. If you find an exercise that doesn't work for you, then--just like in yoga--you have the option to modify, or completely opt out. Everyone is encouraged to participate at their own comfort level, and our facilitators do a fabulous job demonstrating what that looks like, so it feels good for everyone. Great question! Think of it as a refreshing twist on the traditional dating scene. You'll get to interact, laugh, and connect with others, and then decide who you'd like to get to know better. We put a fun spin on things by letting the ladies take the lead in choosing; they'll place one of their beads in each man's pouch that they want to connect with. They'll get a feel for the guys' personalities and presence, while the men are guided on how to be grounded and open-hearted. Afterwards, either party can contact the other. It's all about letting connections unfold naturally. Think comfort with a touch of your best self! You'll be sitting and also moving, so choose an outfit that lets you feel relaxed but still sharp. Just remember, it's a date, so grooming matters. And go easy on strong scents; some people are sensitive. We usually don't serve food or drinks (unless it's a special event), so feel free to bring a water bottle. Snacks might be good for before or after, but check with the venue, as some don't allow food. As tempting as a quick bite during the event might be, you'll want all your attention on your dates. And remember, alcohol is a no-go, so please arrive with a clear and ready mind. We get it—nerves can make you want an escape hatch! But here's the thing: this is a structured experience. And once you get here you’ll actually *want* to be in for the whole ride. If you duck out early you'll miss dates, besides once you're here you won't want to leave. Our facilitators create such a welcoming container that the nervousness melts away fast. So much so, that at the end of the night, singles don't want it to end, so they spontaneously head out to grab a bite or hang together. Give yourself the space to stay for the whole experience. Your future connections will thank you. Get ready for a lively evening with up to 20 opportunities to connect! Our events typically max out at around 40 singles. Assuming a balanced mix, you'll have the chance to spark a connection with up to 20 different people. And, we're all about quality not quantity. You'll find each moment meaningful as you dive into engaging exchanges with others who, just like you, are looking to explore connection and authenticity. We don't believe in leaving anyone out of the fun, so we do our best to aim for an equal gender balance. Of course, it isn't always 100% under our control--even our matchmaking powers have their limits. But so far, just about every event has been sold out. And since we have an equal number of tickets per gender, they've all had a solid mix of singles ready to mingle! (We also occasionally use door sales magic to balance the gender too.) As many of our attendees say, "I don't even care if I match with anyone, this was amazing!" That said, we track numbers closely. Our statistics say there is a 94.09% chance you'll match with AT LEAST one person. But if for whatever reason the probability fails you, we've got you covered. Your next ticket will be free! Some events have a suggested age range (noted in the title and description) and some are open to all ages. Whether you're a little outside the range or just curious about meeting people within it, you're welcome here. Our most popular events are open to all ages, drawing a vibrant and diverse crowd. Singles 30-45 tend to be the largest group. Followed by folks 45+ and then 20s. And while age might be a curiosity, what truly sets our events apart is the connection experience. But here's the thing. It's more than just about the dates. And this is what makes Tantra Speed Date® unique. Singles everywhere rave about how the experience itself can be quite transformative, regardless of their matches. Why? Simply engaging consciously with other singles in a positive and structured way promotes more healthy relationships. And it just plain feels good to connect with real people. You likely have never experienced dating in such a fun and comfortable way. You'll gain confidence, pick up new skills, and will likely start to attract more quality people into your life. That's what our participants say over and over again! Don't let low RSVPs in one spot fool you. Our events often sell out faster than you can say "Namaste," and often with a waiting list. We're keen to promote across various platforms, and they don't all show the same love. Rest assured, we make sure there's always a crowd worth your while. So come on down; your next amazing connection could be just one RSVP away! Ah, the modern relationship landscape—a tapestry of statuses! While you don't need to be 'single' in the traditional sense, you do need to be in a space where romantic connections are possible. If you're already committed and not open to new love, you may want to consider our couples events. But if you find your heart's door ajar, even just a smidge—or if you're teetering on the edge of 'ready to date'—this could be the perfect space to explore what's possible. Consider this your invitation to a playground of connection, perfect for testing the waters! Diversity is the spice of life, and we're cooking up all kinds of flavors! This classic version of Tantra Speed Date® is primarily designed for men-seeking-women and women-seeking-men. In this setup you'll find yourself in one of two gendered circles—one for men and one for women. You'll rotate through up to 20 dates with members of the opposite gender. But don't fret, fabulous queer friends! We also host Queer Tantra Speed Date events in select cities. So if you're looking for a rainbow connection, keep an eye on our website to see when we're bringing that magic to a city near you! We get it--life's a whirlwind! If you find yourself having to back out, no worries. Here's the lowdown: cancel 24 hours or more ahead and you'll get a refund or transfer, no fuss. If you're within that 24-hour window, or fashionably late and miss the opening ceremony, shoot us an email and we'll graciously "speed date" your ticket to the next event as a one-time courtesy. (Just know that we may not be able to get back to you until the next day, as we'll be busy prepping for the event!) So keep your plans as flexible as a yoga pose, and communicate with us before the event kicks off. No refunds or transfers after the chimes ring and the magic starts! Absolutely! We often have Bring-A-Friend ticket discounts! So thanks for sharing Tantra Speed Date® with your friends! However, do be sure to fill out their name and their email address on the attendee form. Otherwise we will not be able to check them in properly, and they will not receive all the wonderful matches they'll make at the event. If we had a nickel for how many times your friends email us wondering where their matches went... well, you get the picture. So please. Do your friends a solid and fill in their proper details. We offer 3 pricing tiers based on when you purchase. There's no difference in the experience, just the price and availability: 💡 PRO TIP: The earlier you buy, the more you save. TSD is even more fun with a friend! 👯‍♀️ When Last Minute tickets go live, you'll sometimes see a 2-for-1 bundle—two tickets for the price of one. To get the offer, just select the 2-for-1 ticket option. You’ll purchase You're not imagining things—Early Birds often sell out fast. Best way to snag one? Join our newsletter. Subscribers get first dibs on new events (often before they're posted publicly)—not to mention Guy's reader-acclaimed dating tips, exclusive discounts, and surprise giveaways. 👉 Contact us at Dive Into The Magic of Conscious Connection With Up To 20 Guided Speed Dates!

rows.Event Name: Couples Workshop-Hold Me Tight®
rows.Event Description: Couples will learn to overcome negative stuck spots, communicate for closeness and care, and heal relational hurts and injuries. Our Hold Me Tight® Workshop for Couples is based on Attachment Theory, Emotionally Focused Couples Therapy, and the international best-selling book "Hold Me Tight: Seven Conversations for a Lifetime of Love" by Dr. Sue Johnson. In our workshop, you will learn what is at the root of most conflicts between you and your partner, and how to change those moments through a proven method that all couples can do. Investing in a couples workshop as a new couple, engaged or newlywed pair is one of the most proactive and rewarding steps you can take for your relationship. These workshops equip you with tools to navigate challenges, communicate effectively, and build a strong foundation rooted in mutual understanding and respect. Think of it as preventative care for your love—addressing potential issues before they arise and fostering a deeper connection that lasts. Prioritize this relationship early!**This is also a great gift to consider for loved ones and family members who are wanting to learn about creating healthy relationship foundations but might not have the resources to attend** For couples who have been together for years, a couples workshop can reignite the spark and strengthen the connection that first brought you together. Over time, life’s demands can lead to communication gaps or unspoken frustrations, but this workshop provides a safe and supportive space to reconnect. You’ll learn new strategies to deepen intimacy, resolve conflicts, and rediscover the joy in your partnership. Whether you’re navigating a rough patch or simply seeking to grow together, this experience can breathe new life into your relationship, fostering a bond that’s resilient and more fulfilling than ever. You will not be doing large group sharing as much as having private conversations with your partner and the two of you have an option to utilize the therapists that are assisting to help with these conversations. This workshop will be facilitated by Michelle Hildt and the Therapy With Heart Team. Hold Me Tight® is a registered trademark to Sue Johnson

rows.Event Name: Ancestral Artistry-2026 Arizona Architectural Film Showcase
rows.Event Description: The film explores the legacy of Black craftsmen and builders whose artistry shaped Louisiana and New Orleans unique history and culture. Produced by the Louisiana Architecture Foundation, this film explores the legacy of Black craftsmen and builders whose artistry shaped Louisiana’s architectural identity. The film explores a centuries-old legacy rooted in craftsmanship, culture, and resilience—a story that begins over 300 years ago with the arrival of enslaved Africans in French colonial Louisiana. These individuals brought with them not only strength and endurance, but deep knowledge in building trades like carpentry, masonry, iron smithing, and plasterwork. Their skill shaped the physical and cultural landscape of Louisiana in profound and lasting ways. Over generations, these trades were passed down through families and communities, evolving into a distinctive architectural identity that sets Louisiana apart from other parts of the United States. These traditions took root in a place unlike much of America—a colony and later state that fostered a significant population of free people of color, many of mixed African and European descent. For these Creoles of Color, the building trades were more than a means of survival; they became a path to wealth, independence, and social mobility in an era when African-descended people faced severe restrictions across much of the country. The film illuminates how African and European influences merged in Louisiana's architecture through both technique and artistry. From finely crafted ironwork and ornate plaster details to expertly constructed homes and public buildings, the contributions of these Black and Creole artisans helped define Louisiana’s unique built environment. Yet their names and stories are often absent from history books, their contributions underrecognized and at risk of being forgotten. Butler Housing Company Coldwell Banker Historic Homes Group

rows.Event Name: Denver Nova Catalyst Circles
rows.Event Description: Small, facilitated circles for women to think out loud, incubate ideas, and draw clarity and momentum from collective wisdom. CATALYST CIRCLES Catalyst Circles are designed as a place to think out loud, try ideas on, and be supported by the wisdom of the room. This is a space to bring what you’re curious about, building toward, questioning, or quietly holding, and let it move through conversation rather than carrying it alone. You don’t need a polished idea or a clear ask. You just need a desire for a thoughtful room where things can take shape. Each month, we gather for a midday pause that offers clarity, connection, and momentum — without the structure or commitment of a long-term program. WHAT HAPPENS IN A CATALYST CIRCLE We meet in small, intentionally held groups of three to four people, facilitated by Nova. The size is deliberate — intimate enough for depth, spacious enough for perspective. Within your small group, you’ll have space to: This is a collaborative sandbox, not a coaching session or mastermind. There’s no pressure to perform, pitch, or arrive with answers. The facilitator’s role is to hold the container and guide the flow so everyone has space to participate. You’ll leave feeling clearer, more supported, and less alone with what you’re creating. Catalyst Circles are for women and non-binary professionals who value thinking in conversation with others and want a place to explore ideas without rushing them. This experience is especially supportive if you’re curious about deeper work and want to engage in a thoughtful, self-contained circle without committing to an ongoing container. Location: Kiln Littleton 2650 W Belleview Ave, Suite D-100 Littleton, CO 80123 When: Third Wednesday of every month Time: 11:30 AM – 1:00 PM Catalyst Circles are intentionally small. Registration is required in advance. The Nova is a membership-based community for women and non-binary professionals who value authentic connection, thoughtful leadership, and building lives and careers with intention. Through curated gatherings, facilitated conversations, and deeper coaching containers, The Nova creates spaces where people can think clearly, connect meaningfully, and grow together — without performance or pressure. We’d love to have you with us—

rows.Event Name: Karuna Reiki® 1 and 2 Class
rows.Event Description: Karuna Reiki Class This class is for anyone who wishes to further his or her practice of Reiki and has had Reiki I and II.. Karuna Reiki® Class This class is for anyone who wishes to further his or her practice of Reiki and has had Reiki training. It is complete with two levels.. Karuna is a Sanskrit word used in Hinduism and Buddhism to mean “compassionate action.” Karuna is the motivating quality of those beings who are working to end suffering on Earth. As you develop Karuna in yourself, not only are you helping others, but you also become more receptive to greater capacities for compassion and healing. Karuna Reiki works on the emotional and spiritual levels and also can help one become more grounded. Those who receive the attunements report experiences with their guides, angels, and higher self and feel the healing presence of other enlightened beings. The class is given in two days, the first for practitioner level 1, and the second day teaches Karuna II. Check back on the calendar for scheduling of the Karuna Master class at a later date. Karuna Reiki® Training Recommended Class Outline Day 1 1. Registration 2. Smudging or aura clearing or grounding exercise (optional) 3. Introductions 4. Opening meditation or prayer 5. What is Karuna Reiki®? Describe Karuna Reiki® as compassionate action guided by wisdom, and explain the two levels. 6. Origin of Karuna Reiki® 7. Karuna Reiki® Spiritual Guidance and connection with Spiritual Beings 8. Karuna Reiki® I symbols and how to activate them 9. How to give a Karuna Reiki® session 10. Describe how to draw Karuna Reiki® I symbols and what they are used for 11. Lunch 12. Symbol test, Karuna level I 13. Karuna Reiki® Level I attunement 14. Have students write down their experiences then discuss them 15. Practice using Karuna Reiki® I symbols, two to four at each table. Take five to ten minutes for each symbol. Each person receives a session with all four symbols. Talk about what each symbol felt like after each symbol is used. 16. Closing meditation Day 2 1. Smudging (optional) 2. Opening meditation or prayer 3. Shadow self discussion 4. Shadow self-meditation 5. Discussion and sharing 6. Break 7. Describe how to draw Karuna Reiki® II symbols and what they are used for 8. Lunch 9. Symbol test, Karuna Level II 10. Karuna Reiki® Level II attunement 11. Have students write down their experiences then discuss them 12. Practice using Karuna Reiki® II symbols two to four students at each table. Take five-ten minutes for each symbol. Each person gets a session with all four symbols. Talk about what each felt like after each symbol is used. 13. Closing meditation Payment is your only way to reserve.. The class will be facilitated by Rod Lyman, Reiki Master teacher. Limited Seating: Reserve your seat now.. Only 10 students per class.. Investment $200 For 1 and 2

rows.Event Name: Evicshen at Linger Longer Lounge
rows.Event Description: Experimental musician Evicshen performing live for Desert Drone at Linger Longer Lounge. Victoria Shen is an experimental music performer and sound artist from San Francisco. Though analog synthesizers are the backbone of Shen’s music, while performing live, she plays self-made electronics, invented instruments, and even acoustic objects like a bull whip. Shen is a markedly mobile performer that muddles the boundaries between performer and audience, stage and floor. Her sets tend to be site-specific, in direct response to the physical and acoustic qualities of the space in which she performs. Her live show vacillates between moments of restraint and swells of frenetic and confrontational movement. A tightrope walk between control and chance, the whiff of danger is never far during Shen’s performances. Her sound is dynamic with a sensitivity to texture and structure throughout. with local support from Lauren Sarah Hayes. Doors 7:30pm Music 8:00pm

rows.Event Description: Make a cherry cutting board with handle & juice groove! Beginner-friendly. All tools & materials included. In this hands-on woodworking class, you’ll make your own hardwood cutting board complete with a handle cutout and juice groove. Using beautiful domestic cherry wood and a variety of Rockler tools and jigs, you’ll learn fundamental woodworking techniques to create a durable and functional piece that looks great in any kitchen. The finished board will measure approximately ¾" x 12" x 16". What You’ll Do: • Learn to glue up a cutting board blank using Rockler’s Mini Deluxe Panel Clamps • Experience Rockler’s unique “Pay-It-Forward” process — the board you glue will be used in a future class, and you’ll receive a pre-glued board to continue your project • Flatten your cutting board using a drum sander • Square up the board using a table saw • Route a handle cutout using Rockler’s 4-in-1 Cutting Board Handle Routing Template and a compact router • Add a juice groove with Rockler’s Juice Groove Jig • Sand all edges, corners, and surfaces until smooth • Apply a food-safe finish (Odie’s Oil) • Install non-slip rubber feet to complete your board What’s Included: • All materials, domestic cherry hardwood, and supplies • Use of Rockler tools, jigs, and equipment • Rockler safety gear (provided at no additional charge) Important Info: • Class is beginner-friendly — no prior woodworking experience required • All safety gear and materials are included

At the end of the course, the student can perform a complete 60-minute Thai massage routine, including supine, side-lying, prone and seated positions. In Level 1, we begin with the origin of Thai Massage, introduce the theory of Sen lines, and Thai asanas or therapeutic postures. We teach basic principles of western muscular anatomy and place a strong emphasis upon body mechanics and practicing bodywork in a sustainable way. Many western practitioners experience symptoms of occupational disability in hands, shoulders and arms due to reliance upon muscular strength and failure to understand the power of working from the core. We use yoga principles to teach the student how to move in an efficient, elegant and powerful way. With strong fundamentals, Thai bodywork can be not only safe but beneficial for the practitioner and will provide a deeply satisfying career that lasts many decades. $360 12CE Tuition includes workbook and a printed certificate. *Digital certificate copies for replacement are available for $5/each. rows.Event Description: For Richer or Poorer / In Sickness & In Health Peace and Joy to you! Welcome to our Church Married Couples Retreat Registration. We are delighted and grateful that you are considering joining us for our 2026 Marriage Retreat. 2026 will be our fifth retreat, and we are excited with great anticipation of what God will do in the lives of the couples joining us this time. Our prayer is that you invest in yourself and each other. Set the time and finances aside to join us in Scottsdale, AZ. We are trusting God for 150 couples because we believe that this weekend will strengthen marriages, inspire new memories, and help us grow in love and faith. Our first retreat was in 2015 with five couples (Phoenix). Our second retreat was in the entertaining city of Las Vegas with 25 couples. Our third retreat was by far our largest (Scottsdale). We had over 40 couples in attendance, and a soul was added to the Christian Family. Our last retreat was on sea aboard the Carnival Firenze (Ensenada & /Cabo San Lucas). There were a total of 16 couples who launched out in the deep with us. The Lord has been faithful over the years as we have tackled several themes, such as How to Communicate, Five Love Languages, and “For Better or For Worse, I Ain’t Going Nowhere”. This special weekend in July 2026 will be dedicated to deepening our commitment with our spouses and with God as we unpack this year's theme - Throughout our time together, you’ll have the opportunity to participate in faith-filled sessions, engaging workshops, meaningful conversations with other couples, and to rediscover the love that brought you together. Have the tough conversations, don’t shy away from them. Along with spiritual enrichment, you’ll enjoy fellowship, fun activities, resort accommodations, amenities, and the serene beauty of the Arizona desert. Please know that we value you and your marriage, and we are honored to support you on your marital journey. If you should have any questions and/or concerns regarding our past retreats or our upcoming retreat, please do not hesitate to reach out to us directly. Our contact information is listed below. rows.Event Name: 2026 Executive of the Year Award honoring Todd LaPorte
rows.Event Description: President and CEO, HonorHealth With now 40 years of diverse experience in healthcare, Todd LaPorte leads an integrated health system with nine acute-care hospitals, a surgical hospital, a rehab hospital , a behavioral health hospital, an extensive footprint of outpatient services (through dozens of medical group practices, ambulatory surgery centers, and various forms of urgent care settings), and an array of community services (including a food bank, adult day care, a children’s learning center, and an anchor role with a community well-being Blue Zones project). To advance HonorHealth’s mission to improve the health and well-being of the community, he creates an environment where every team member – over 20,000 clinical and support staff, volunteers and physicians – collaborates to deliver a top decile patient experience and make a positive impact on the health of our community. The scale of employees makes HonorHealth the fifth largest employer in Arizona. Since joining HonorHealth in 2001, he has held executive roles where he focused on financial and strategic leadership. He has shaped a system with many access points to provide convenience for patients. He has promoted innovative technologies and engaged employees & physicians at a top quartile level as measured by industry benchmark. In April 2017, Todd became the 10th CEO in more than 150 years of HonorHealth history. Prior to HonorHealth, he held senior management roles for an international CPA firm that served many Arizona healthcare clients, as well as clients in high-tech manufacturing and consumer services. He was also the CFO of a privately held healthcare company that served over a half million Arizonans. Todd was named CFO of the Year by the Arizona chapter of the Financial Executives International in 2012 and was recognized by Becker's Healthcare in 2024 as one of the "Great Leaders in Healthcare.” He is a CPA , holds a bachelor's degree in business from the University of Arizona and an MBA from Arizona State University. Todd has served as board chair for a chapter of Big Brothers/Big Sisters, the Scottsdale Aquatic Club, the Paradise Valley School District’s supporting Foundation for Public Education, and the Health System Alliance of Arizona. He currently serves on the boards of Experience Scottsdale, the Greater Phoenix Economic Council., Health Insights, and the board for Region 8 of the American Hospital Association. He is also a member of Greater Phoenix Leadership and a Scottsdale chapter for C12.

rows.Event Name: Business Finance Basics – Smart Decisions Made Simple! in Glendale, AZ
rows.Event Description: Unlock the power of financial literacy-join our Business Finance Basics course start making smarter, data-driven decisions with confidence! 📜 📅 🏫 🗣 🎓 In today's fast-paced business environment, financial literacy is no longer optional—it’s a critical skill for anyone who wants to lead, manage, or contribute strategically. The Business Finance Basics course from Kogniora Global empowers non-financial professionals with the knowledge and confidence to interpret financial data, create and manage budgets, and support better business decision-making. This 1-day intensive course is tailored for managers, entrepreneurs, and team leads who may not have a background in finance but are increasingly required to understand the financial implications of their work. Participants will explore the building blocks of financial statements, analyze real-life financial scenarios, and learn how to apply budgeting tools effectively. The course uses practical exercises, live instruction, and industry-relevant case studies to ensure hands-on learning with immediate takeaways. We begin by laying the foundation of why financial literacy matters and explore how finance supports the overall success of an organization. Participants will understand the role of key financial statements and their interconnections. This module introduces participants to assets, liabilities, and equity. Through real-life examples, you'll learn how to assess a company’s solvency, capital structure, and financial position at a point in time. Dive into how businesses measure profitability. Learn to interpret revenue streams, costs, and profit margins while connecting financial outcomes to strategic planning and performance management. Gain familiarity with the cash flow statement and the statement of stockholders’ equity. Learn what these statements reveal about operations, investments, and financial stability. We also touch on reporting standards for nonprofits. Understand the principles of effective budgeting, including types of budgets, what to include, and how to align budgets with strategic initiatives. In this final module, you’ll build a sample operating budget and learn to apply activity-based budgeting techniques. Learn how to track and adjust budgets to remain agile and responsive in business environments. This course is designed for professionals who are not from a finance background but increasingly engage with financial data or budgeting responsibilities, including: Finance is the language of business, and understanding it empowers you to contribute more strategically to your organization’s success. The physical body becomes the Every stroke, pressure point, and sequence is applied with intention — to activate, release, redistribute, and harmonize energy throughout the body. Because energy operates on multiple levels, the effects of this work are multidimensional. Women often experience: This immersion offers a clear foundational sequence within a carefully guided container, allowing you to explore this work safely, consciously, and with depth. Do note, floor-based massage practices are part of this retreat. Participants should be physically comfortable kneeling and working on the floor for extended periods. Through guided Tantra Healing Touch practices, theoretical teachings, live demonstrations, and structured partner work, you will: This is experiential, educational, and deeply embodied. Held at Harmony Hollow, a serene desert sanctuary near Spur Cross Reserve in Cave Creek, Arizona. This is a Light refreshments and tea are provided. A kitchen and shower are available on site. Participation is by application to ensure a balanced and harmonious group. After making payment and securing your spot, you will complete a short online application form and schedule a 15-minute video conversation with the head teacher. Beloved Woman, You have carried so much. This weekend, you are invited to If something inside you feels stirred - trust it. The Art of Healing Touch is a return. A sacred circle is forming. If you feel the call, step forward. Say YES to yourself.

rows.Event Description: Absence Management: 1 Day course on reducing workplace absence, legal rules, practical tools, and improving attendance. Save Duration: 1 Full Day (8 Hours) This course provides several useful handouts and exercises relating to absence management. What is ‘Absence’? And how do we go about managing it and reducing it wherever we can, without falling foul of employment law? This training has been created to help safely navigate you through the minefield of absence management, paying attention to issues of systems, procedures and organizational culture along the way. Using a selection of exercises, activities and sample documents, the course examines some traditional methods of management as well as some more contemporary and innovative ways of keeping a lid on casual absence. Participants will take away a number of practical tools and ideas to enable them to target performance improvement when back at their desks. At the end of this absence management training you will be able to give a clear definition of what absence is outline the legal and contractual issues around the management of absence have the knowledge to manage absence and to work towards improving overall attendance at work produce a plan to review absenteeism in your team and where required, an action list to implement measures for improvement. This could include; Team leaders, supervisors, managers, HR professionals and anyone else involved in the management of people or organizations. Managing absence effectively is critical to maintaining productivity, morale, and legal compliance within any organization. This course goes beyond theory by combining practical tools, real-world case discussions, and actionable strategies that managers can immediately implement. It addresses not only policies and procedures but also the cultural and behavioral factors that influence absenteeism. By attending, participants will gain structured methods to track absence, reduce costs, improve attendance, and confidently handle sensitive employee conversations — all while staying aligned with employment law and organizational best practices. rows.Event Name: Human-Centered AI Leadership Series
rows.Event Description: This 5-session series helps professionals lead AI-driven change with clarity, confidence, and people-first strategies. Human-Centered AI Leadership is a cohort-based professional development course designed for leaders and professionals navigating the growing impact of artificial intelligence in the workplace. Rather than focusing on technical skills or AI tools, the course centers on leadership, decision-making, communication, and the human implications of technological change. Delivered over multiple sessions, participants explore how AI is reshaping work, how leaders make decisions in uncertain environments, and how to communicate change in ways that build trust and engagement. The course emphasizes real-world application, allowing participants to apply concepts directly to their roles and organizational contexts. This program is ideal for managers, people leaders, and professionals responsible for guiding teams through change who want a practical, human-centered approach to leading in an AI-enabled world. This course brings together professionals who register as individuals to learn in small, facilitated cohorts, engaging in practical, workplace-focused learning alongside peers from a variety of organizations. This in-person series is held at the The $600 registration fee includes all five sessions. ---------- This opening session establishes a shared foundation for the cohort by reframing artificial intelligence as a leadership challenge rather than a purely technical one. Participants explore how rapid technological change, growing uncertainty, and shifting expectations are already influencing their work and decision-making, often in subtle but meaningful ways. The session focuses on helping leaders separate signal from noise. Participants examine common misconceptions about AI, where organizations tend to overreact or underreact, and why waiting for complete certainty often creates greater risk than acting thoughtfully. Through discussion and reflection, leaders begin to recognize how their assumptions about technology and change shape their leadership behavior. Participants reflect on where AI is already affecting their role, their team, or their organization, even in the absence of a formal AI strategy. The session introduces a shared language and perspective that will support deeper exploration throughout the program. By the end of this session, participants will be able to: ---------- This session addresses one of the most common challenges leaders face during periods of disruption: making decisions when information is incomplete or constantly evolving. Participants explore why decision paralysis often increases in AI driven environments and how overreliance on data or automation can unintentionally weaken leadership judgment. The session examines the relationship between human decision making and algorithmic recommendations, highlighting where each adds value and where caution is required. Leaders discuss the risks of delayed action as well as the consequences of acting too quickly without reflection. Participants surface real decisions they are currently struggling with and apply practical approaches for moving forward responsibly. The emphasis is placed on building confidence in the decision-making process rather than finding perfect outcomes. By the end of this session, participants will be able to: ---------- As organizations adopt new technologies, the greatest challenges are often human rather than technical. This session focuses on how fear, resistance, and uncertainty show up in teams and how leadership communication directly shapes employee experience and trust. Participants explore why resistance to change is a rational response and how concerns about identity, relevance, and job security often sit beneath surface-level objections. The session emphasizes transparent communication, empathy, and leadership presence during periods of transition. Leaders practice reframing AI-related messages in ways that acknowledge uncertainty while reinforcing trust and shared purpose. Realistic workplace scenarios are used to ground the discussion in everyday leadership interactions. By the end of this session, participants will be able to: ---------- This session shifts the focus from awareness to application, helping leaders move beyond abstract conversations about AI and toward thoughtful implementation. Participants explore how to evaluate where AI can genuinely support work rather than introduce unnecessary complexity. The session emphasizes aligning technology with real organizational needs, existing workflows, and human capabilities. Leaders discuss how to distinguish efficiency gains from meaningful impact and why ethical considerations are inseparable from leadership responsibility. Participants apply these ideas to real situations within their own organizations, identifying opportunities where AI may enhance work while preserving trust and purpose. By the end of this session, participants will be able to: ---------- The final session brings the cohort together to reflect on leadership identity, long-term relevance, and the uniquely human capabilities that remain essential in an AI-enabled workplace. Participants consolidate insights from the program and consider how their leadership approach will evolve as technology continues to change. The session focuses on sense-making, judgment, empathy, and purpose as enduring leadership strengths. Participants reflect on how continuous adaptation becomes a leadership practice rather than a one-time response. Leaders identify concrete actions they will take beyond the program and share insights with the cohort to reinforce learning and accountability. By the end of this session, participants will be able to: ---------- We are committed to providing accessible events. If you require ADA accommodations to fully participate, please contact us at By attending this event, I authorize the Maricopa Community Colleges (including its colleges and related entities) to photograph, video, or quote me and to use the photographs, videos, or quotes for educational or promotional purposes in any type of media. The photographs, videos, and quotes may not be used for profit without my express permission. I understand that I will not be paid or rewarded for providing this authorization.

rows.Event Name: The Art of Proofing
rows.Event Description: Join us for an immersive tasting where you'll work with cask-strength whiskey to explore how proof affects aroma, flavor, and balance. Instead of tasting a finished Outlaw product, at The Art of Proofing, you'll become the blender — crafting multiple expressions of the same whiskey at different proof points. This experience blends sensory exploration with practical knowledge, connecting chemistry, craft, and personal taste. Whether you're a curious whiskey enthusiast or a seasoned spirits explorer, you'll leave with a deeper appreciation for how proof shapes the whiskey in your glass. Come ready to experiment, taste, and discover your ideal proof!

Everything you need is included, from the canvas to the paints, so all you have to do is bring your friends and a sense of adventure. This is not your typical art class; this is your ticket to a good time. rows.Event Name: Upcoming ITIL 4 Foundation Course in Phoenix, AZ – Limited Slots
rows.Event Description: ITIL Foundation provides a foundational understanding of the ITIL framework for IT service management, offering guidance and best practices. The Foundation level is the entry level certification and offers you a general awareness of the key elements, concepts, and terminology used in the ITIL® service lifecycle, including the links between lifecycle stages, the processes used and their contribution to service management practices.Learners Ink ITIL® Foundation Exam Prep is designed and developed by the global panel of ITIL® Expert instructors to ensure that our participants pass the ITIL® Foundation exam on their first attempt. Our hands-on training helped many participants in transforming their careers. Our Lead Instructor focus on the key concepts, terminologies and elements included with ITIL® service lifecycle management. The training includes best practices from ITSM processes and Service Management, ITIL® lifecycle Phase Interactions & Outcomes. Service Design: Design Coordination, Service Catalog Management, Service Level Management, Availability Management, Capacity Management, IT Service Continuity Management, Information Security Management. Service Transition: Transition Planning & Support, Change Management, Service Asset & Configuration Management, Release & Deployment Management, Service Validation & Testing, Change Evaluation, Knowledge Management Service Operation: Event Management, Incident Management, Request Fulfilment, Problem Management, Access Management, and the functions of: IT Operations, Technical Management, Application Management, Service Desk Continual Service Improvement: Seven-Step Improvement Process ITIL 4 contains seven guiding principles that were adopted from the most recent ITIL Practitioner Exam, which covers organizational change management, communication, and measurement and metrics. These principles include: · Focus on value · Start where you are · Progress iteratively with feedback · Collaborate and promote visibility · Think and work holistically · Keep it simple and practical · Optimize and automate ITIL 4 focuses on company culture and integrating IT into the overall business structure. It encourages collaboration between IT and other departments, especially as other business units increasingly rely on technology to get work done. Courseware Approved by PEOPLECERT16 hours of instructor-led training (for Traditional classroom and Online Classroom Training) Industry-based case studies & real world-examples Chapter end quizzes & 2 simulation exams 100% Money Back Guarantee* Exam fee included (Exam fee not included for Online Self Learning) 24/7 support via email, online chat, telephone · Manage risk in line with business & service disruption or failure · Show value for money · Optimize customer experience · Enable business change · Aids continuous service improvement · Support business outcomes · The salary ranges from $81,040 to $111,053 per year There is no defined eligibility criterion for ITIL Foundation exam. In order to pass the exam, you will need to get 28 of the 40 questions right, or score a 70%. This means you can get up to 12 questions wrong and still pass. Exam will be conducted Online at your preferred time. We also conduct Onsite training for

rows.Event Name: Family Paint Party
rows.Event Description: Paint Nite -- Families and All Ages (10359664) Join Rebecca Holcomb for a night of creativity as you paint "Flight of the Fireflies." This Paint Nite event is the perfect excuse to leave the house and enjoy a social atmosphere. No need to stress about your skill level—this is all about having fun with friends and family while letting your imagination run wild. With all supplies provided, you can focus on the experience instead of worrying about bringing anything. Gather your crew and make some memories while creating something colorful and unique. In this two-hour session, you'll explore the beauty of blue trees under a starlit sky as you bring "Flight of the Fireflies" to life on a 16" x 20" canvas. Rebecca, a talented artist with a perfect 5-star rating and ten hosted events, will guide you every step of the way. You'll receive all the painting supplies you need, including brushes and paint, so just show up and have a blast. This event is for all ages, making it a fantastic option for family outings or fun nights with friends. Located at The Silver Key Lounge in Mesa, this event is surrounded by a vibrant atmosphere perfect for a fun night out. Whether you're looking for unique Mesa date night ideas or simply wanting to try something new, a Mesa paint night is the ideal solution. The venue is easy to find at 1837 W Guadalupe Rd Ste 105, making it a convenient option for anyone in the area. If you're in the mood for something a little different, think of it as a Mesa paint and sip experience where you can relax and enjoy some laughter while you paint, making it one of the top things to do in Mesa. If you're interested in a private event, we have options for groups of ten or more, perfect for birthdays or special gatherings. Plus, if you bring three or more friends, you can snag a 15% discount. So grab your friends, reserve your spot, and get ready for a night of fun, laughter, and creativity at Paint Nite! Age: Kids and up

rows.Event Name: Bodywork(Upper Quarter) & Breathwork with Dr. Savannah Torrez, PT, DPT
rows.Event Description: Release tension. Breathe deeper. Reset your body. Led by a Doctor of Physical Therapy Tight shoulders. Shallow breathing. A nervous system that won’t shut off? This 90-minute upper body reset is designed to release tension in your neck, shoulders, chest, and arms—so your breath deepens, your body softens, and your mind finally exhales. This is not a workout. This is not talk therapy. This is intentional, guided bodywork paired with calming breathwork to help your system downshift and reset. ⸻ This class focuses on the upper body, where stress, posture, and daily life tend to live the longest. You’ll be guided through: • Self-directed myofascial release to improve mobility and relieve deeply held tension in the shoulders, chest, arms, and upper back • Gentle, intentional breathwork to calm the nervous system, support relaxation, and help your body actually receive the work • A slow, grounded pace designed to help you feel lighter, more open, and more at ease when you leave You don’t need prior experience. Everything is guided and optional. ⸻ • You carry stress in your neck, shoulders, or chest • You feel tight, overwhelmed, or “on” all the time • You want relief without aggressive workouts or intense modalities • You appreciate a science-based approach that still feels calming and human • A high-intensity workout • Forced emotional release • “Woo-woo” breathwork or anything performative You are always in control of your body and your breath. ⸻ Led by Dr. Savannah Torrez, Doctor of Physical Therapy, Certified Orthopedic Manual Therapist, and Breathwork Facilitator. This class blends clinical expertise with nervous system–informed care—bridging the gap between traditional bodywork and restorative, somatic practices in a grounded, accessible way. ⸻ This isn’t just movement. It’s not just breath. It’s a nervous system–focused reset designed to help your body let go of tension it’s been holding onto—often without realizing it. • More open through the chest and shoulders • Breathing deeper and more easily • Calmer, grounded, and less “wired” Comparable to a private bodywork or breath session—experienced in a supportive small-group setting. ⸻ Enhance your experience with optional red light therapyduring the breathwork portion of class. Red light therapy supports: • Circulation • Cellular recovery • Nervous system regulation Helping your body integrate the work more deeply. Available as an add-on at checkout or in-studio. Limited availability. ⸻ Water, a blanket, pillow, and eye mask if you’d like. All myofascial tools are provided. I do have extra blankets and eye masks. Comfortable clothing you can move and relax in. 90 minutes | In-person event ⸻ 📍 2602 W Baseline Rd, Suite 2 Mesa, AZ 85202 ⸻ 💲 $30 (Plus Eventbrite processing fees) ⸻ If you’ve been feeling tight, overwhelmed, disconnected, or simply in need of a deeper kind of care—this class was created for you. Reserve your spot and feel the difference. ⸻ Breathwork sessions are intended for relaxation, personal growth, and wellness. They are not a substitute for medical or psychological treatment. If you have a history of cardiovascular disease, uncontrolled high blood pressure, epilepsy, glaucoma, retinal detachment, recent surgery, significant psychiatric conditions, or are pregnant, please consult your physician before participating

rows.Event Name: Arizona Dumpling Fest & Filipino Festival (Free Event)
rows.Event Description: The 2nd annual Filipino Festival is a celebration of culture and the amazing Filipino foods that make up a huge part. The 2nd annual Filipino Festival is a celebration of culture and the amazing Filipino foods that make up a huge part. There will also be a variety of anime/retail vendors at this Asian food festival. This free food festival is about highlighting the diversity of food and an opportunity for small businesses to show their culture through their food. The is a double header festival with the Arizona Dumpling Fest, a preview of Arizona's longest standing bao and dumpling fest. The Arizona Bao and Dumpling Festival is the original themed Asian food festival. What is a bao? From Food Republic, a bao or known as a steamed bun or baozi is a "complete meal conveniently packed away in a white, warm, soft bun." Or what we like to say, an amazing delicious experience. Baos are a form of dumplings and you can try different dumplings from various cultures from takoyaki to potstickers. Come both days to try a little bit from every local business. WHERE: Please RSVP and this will help us have an accurate head count to share with food vendors. This is a free event though and tickets are not needed to enter the event. You can also order online from Happy Buns to guarantee availability during the event as they often sell out.

rows.Event Name: The Relationally Wise Leader & Discovering Relational Wisdom & Peacemaking
rows.Event Description: Leadership training on how to use the principles of relational wisdom to build a highly relational church culture. This half-day day seminar describes the relational challenges churches face today and describes how they can model and teach relational wisdom (biblical emotional intelligence), peacemaking and Christian mediation to inspire and equip their people to respond to life’s challenges in a way that strengthens relationships, reduces conflict, promotes reconciliation, builds unity, preserves marriages and reveals the transforming power of Jesus and His gospel. Time: 6:30 PM -8:30 PM This full-day seminar will provide an introduction to Relational Wisdom, which is a God-centered, biblically grounded, and gospel-driven form of emotional intelligence. Students will learn skills to reduce conflict, harness the power of emotions, build stronger relationships, and become a compelling witness for Christ. We will cover a 3-hour introduction to Relational Wisdom (biblical emotional intelligence) and a 3-hour introduction to Relational Peacemaking (biblical conflict resolution). Lunch is included. Time: 9:00 AM -4:00 PM Ken Sande is the founder of RW360. Trained as an engineer, lawyer, and mediator, Ken has conciliated hundreds of family, business, church, and legal conflicts. He is the author of numerous articles and books, including The Peacemaker, which has sold over 500,000 copies in twenty languages. He is also a Certified Emotional Intelligence Instructor and a Certified Relational Wisdom Conciliator, Coach and Instructor. He teaches internationally on conflict resolution and relational wisdom, which is an enhanced form of emotional intelligence that helps people “get upstream of conflict” by improving their ability to read and manage emotions in themselves and others. These resources are being used to strengthen relationships, promote teamwork and reduce and resolve conflict in churches, families, businesses, schools and military bases around the world. rows.Event Description: This needless technique is used to inject hyaluronic acid to fill in lines and wrinkles. You can also use this technique to dissolve fat. The School of Glamology is an industry leader in providing quality, affordable training in advanced beauty techniques. Not only have we been in business for now 8 years, but we are nationally recognized for training all across the United States of America. We offer small, affordable, and personalized classes to ensure you get the attention and knowledge you paid for. You will be certified by master trainers who are the best in the industry and highly qualified. Not only will you learn the techniques but you’ll also get a chance to ask questions, receive hands on training and gain knowledge from current beauty professionals. We focus on not only producing results, but also how to market your skills and build your business. We want to ensure the success of each student AFTER you leave our classroom. This is your first step to becoming a Students will complete the pre-work before attending the class. Pre-work includes watching a short demonstration video, reading and completing the training manual. Total tuition is due no later than 24 hours before event date. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to call us at 619-928-GLAM Do you want to be the first in your business, salon or spa to offer this amazing service to your clients? Get ready to train on this course and take your career to the next level! What Is A Hyaluron Pen? Simply put, The Pen is the future. It allows anyone with the proper training to provide their clients with a Hyaluronic Acid Treatment. This can be done on lips, deep lines and provides a revitalization treatment for the face. HA forms a super hydrating net over the skin and delivers water to parched skin over time. Hyaluronic Acid is known to have an amazing water-binding capacity, making it ideal for skin hydration and that means the skin is continuously hydrated, plump and healthy. HA TREATMENTS ARE NOW A REALITY THANKS TO ADVANCES IN TECHNOLOGY. USING HYALURONIC ACID BASED PRODUCTS, OUR CUTTING EDGE TECHNIQUE CAN TRANSFORM YOUR SERVICES YOU OFFER TO YOUR CLIENTS. What is involved in the procedure? The procedure is quite simple and the HA used is safe as the human body produces the exact same acid, it is pretty impossible that anyone would get any sort of allergic reaction or complication from the HA itself. The more Hyaluronic Acid there is inside the Epidermis layer of the skin, the more water is retained keeping its moisture and making the appearance of the skin more youthful. Hyaluron Pen … applies HA. How much can you charge for the procedure? Based on your state, area of location and techniques you do. Minimum price to charge as a New Technician is $300 and as you become skilled in your craft you can charge up to $500 for 1 ml of Hyaluronic Acid. This is great for 30 minutes of work! This is a great return on investment. You can get back what you have invested in your training quickly! Hyaluron Pen Device Our controlled dosage delivery with locking function ensures an exact delivery and thus enables SAFE working and only reaches the upper skin layers. This is a needle free aesthetic device which was specifically created and technically optimized for this purpose and to be solely used by beauty professionals. Advantages of Hyaluron Treatment: – Painless Better and faster absorption of Hyaluronic Acid – Needless volume build-up for lips, Needless wrinkle reduction of the nasolabial folds and marionette lines – Safe handling due to modifiable quantity and barrier protection technology – Fast working due to multi-shot system, easy and safe – High economic efficiency, Revolutionary novelty for your customers – High customer satisfaction and loyalty Course Training: 1 Day Only 10 am -5:00 pm The course consists of the following: – In Depth Theory – Health & Safety – Facial Anatomy & Mapping – Lip Histology & Anatomy – Proper Hyaluron Pen Techniques; You will learn techniques and the process for the procedures - Fat Dissolve – Master Instructor Demonstration – Practice – Marketing Advertising Tools & Advice – Device & Kit – Certificate – On-Going Support No only will your training include lip enhancement, fine lines and wrinkle treatment, but we also include teaching our students the techniques for body sculpting. The training starter kit will include: – Professional Hyaluron Device – 5 cartridges - Gloves - Alcohol Swabs – Hyaluronic Acid (1ml) - Fat Dissolve - Mapping Pencil – Training manual – Consent forms, before and aftercare sheets This is a hands-on, in-depth, technical training. Our hands-on in-person certification course provides students with an excellent education that prepares them to offer professional hyaluron pen services shortly after the completion of the course. The School of Glamology is the leader in hyaluron pen certification classes, tools, supplies, and support in the United States. Students who receive their Certification from us are further advanced in knowledge and technique as they complete a course that focuses on in-depth theory and hands-on experience. *This technique is not regulated by the state board of cosmetology; so there is no cosmetologist or esthetician license required in the USA to provide this service. SECURE YOUR DEPOSIT TODAY!!! SPACE IS LIMITED!! info@schoolofglamology.com If you have any questions, don't hesitate to call us at 619-928-GLAM or check our website www.schoolofglamology.com If you have any questions, don't hesitate to call us at 619-928-GLAM or check our website www.schoolofglamology.com Follow us on Instagram: www.instagram.com/schoolofglamology
